attachments.hint: Files referenced by the form — choice files for "select from file" questions, label media, external CSV datasets. They are bundled into the ZIP export and served to the live preview.

translations.removeWarning: Removes every {lang} translation from the form.
translations.displayHint: Language used for labels on the canvas and in the property panel.

translationGrid.addLanguageFirst: Add a language on the left to start translating.
translationGrid.nothingToTranslate: Nothing to translate yet — add labels to your questions first.
